pom.xml.general_idea: Update Maven groupId to reflect the new package namespace.
Update Maven compiler source and target properties to Java 21.
pom.xml.why_exists: Compilation fails if source code uses Java 21 features (e.g., virtual threads, pattern matching enhancements) while the compiler target remains at 17.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add Selenium Java dependency for end-to-end UI testing.
Add WebDriverManager dependency to handle browser driver binaries.
Configure Maven Surefire plugin to set system properties for test result directory.
pom.xml.after:
<plugin>
                <groupId>org.apache.maven.plugins</groupId>
                <artifactId>maven-surefire-plugin</artifactId>
                <version>3.1.2</version>
                <configuration>
                    <!-- Ensure tests write results to target/test-results instead of repo-level ./results -->
                    <systemPropertyVariables>
                        <stinger.results.dir>${project.build.directory}/test-results</stinger.results.dir>
                    </systemPropertyVariables>
                </configuration>
            </plugin>

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Update the logging level configuration to match the new package name after refactoring.

src/main/resources/static/css/style.css.general_idea: Add CSS styles for a new live analysis log UI component.

src/main/resources/static/js/app.js.general_idea: Introduce history and forward stacks to support back/forward navigation in the file browser.
Wire up the back button to trigger the new goBack function.
Consolidate path navigation into a single goToPath function that manages history and UI updates.
Implement the goBack function to pop from history stack and navigate to the previous path.
Add a function to render the history list in the UI, with safety checks for missing DOM elements.
Replace inline onclick handlers with event delegation for file and directory navigation to improve security and maintainability.
src/main/resources/static/js/app.js.after:
<div class="file-item" id="parentDirItem" data-path="${escapeHtml(path)}">
...
fileList.querySelectorAll('.file-item[data-directory="true"]').forEach(item => {
    item.addEventListener('click', function() {
        const path = this.getAttribute('data-path');
        if (path) navigateToDirectory(path);
    });
});

src/main/resources/static/js/app.js.general_idea: Correctly handle navigation to the root of a drive (e.g., C:\) when moving up from a drive letter directory.
Replace the synchronous directory analysis with a Server-Sent Events (SSE) stream for real-time progress updates.
Add null-coalescing operators to analysis result fields to prevent display errors if data is missing.

src/main/resources/templates/index.html.general_idea: Add a Back button to the path navigation section for improved user experience.
Add a comment indicating that browse history is hidden and kept internal.
